content.en:
"Start building a low-profile version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array!"

Ye Tian arranged the formation base everywhere, and he built it alone throughout the whole process, and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords couldn't help at all.

A period of time passed, and almost all the foundations were completed.

Then, Ye Tian began to connect all the formation bases, and then the power of the Dao rules stimulated and urged this low-level version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array, thus connecting the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, so that the land on the other side of eternity gradually returned to its peak period, and even surpassed its peak period.

When the low-profile version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array was opened, Ye Tian's duplicate body needed to urge the formation for a long time, otherwise once it stopped, it would not be able to continue to restore the origin of the land on the other side of eternity.

Rumble!!!!!

The origins of the Eternal Lands are rapidly recovering.

All of this was sensed by an Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Land of Eternity.

......

Ancient Heavenly Palace.

The Desolate Ancestor silently looked at the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, sensing that the origin was rapidly recovering, and was immediately extremely shocked.

"It's ......"

He recalled these years, Ye Tian, the Endless Lord, had been arranging formations everywhere in the land of eternity, and he naturally knew about such a big movement.

And just now, the formation covered the entire land of the Eternal Shore, plus the restoration of the origin of the land of the Eternal Shore.

Obviously, this was done by Ye Tian.

"Restore the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, what kind of formation is this?"

Asozu was shocked.

And the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords also knew about this matter, and they were all curious.

So, they came to Tianshan Pavilion one after another, preparing to visit Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian didn't see them, only one sentence came out.

"The origin of the land on the other side of eternity will gradually recover, even beyond the past, but the territory beyond the land of eternity will not be restored for the time being. "

Hearing this, the desolate ancestors were overjoyed.

If the origin of the land on the other side of eternity surpasses before, then there will definitely be a lot of treasures and precious resources, and they will also hope to break through and become the overlord of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm in the future!

Perhaps, in the future, the land on the other side of eternity will transcend the realm of reincarnation!

Time flies.

Six solstices have passed.

At this time, the land of the eternal shore has long been restored, and even far beyond the past.

At this time.

A large number of treasure lands have been born in the land of the Eternal Shore, and even the eastern, southern, western, and northern regions are not resource-poor.

The human race like Ye Tian was born in the eastern part of the land of eternity, and the entire eastern part did not have a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor at the beginning.

But now, in addition to the human race, the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors have also been born one by one, and the resources and energy here have begun to rival the central part of the past.

Naturally, the central part of the country has become more prosperous, and resources continue to explode.

Gradually, more and more Origin Upper Overlords began to emerge in the Land of Eternity.

Among them, the fastest growing ones are undoubtedly the Tianshan Pavilion and the Human Race.

At present, the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Human Race have joined the Tianshan Pavilion one by one, and a large number of geniuses have also been born.

Now, the Tianshan Pavilion already has hundreds of Origin Upper Realm Overlords, which were unimaginable in the past, and half of them are from the Human Race.

This was naturally the result of Ye Tian's vigorous cultivation of the Terran Race, otherwise how could the Terran Race grow so fast.

Among them, the fastest growing is naturally Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen, who has now reached the sixth balance realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian often urged the power of the eighth sequence of supreme dao rules, and let Ye Xingchen comprehend them, which had already made him comprehend a trace of the ninth sequence supreme dao rules.

It can be said that Ye Xingchen is also an invincible existence in the land of eternity, in addition to Ye Tian.

......

Ancient Heavenly Palace.

The Desolate Ancestor is impacting the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, and this is still a lot of good things that have been obtained recently, coupled with countless years of preparation, this is the only way to have a certain hope.

Of course, the reason that really gave him the confidence to impact the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm was not this, but that he had traded some Endless Lord preaching experience from some Origin Upper Realm Overlords in Tianshan Pavilion.

Some of these experiences involve the major realms of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, including the Nine Awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm.

With a little experience, he has more certainty.

Of course, he also paid a lot of costs.

As time passed, one of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Ancient Heavenly Palace was anxiously waiting.

Finally this day.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying aura emanated from the depths of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, far surpassing the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

"The Desolate Ancestor has broken through to the Ninth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm!!"

The entire Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace was boiling, which meant that the strength of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace had skyrocketed, surpassing other overlord-level forces, second only to Tianshan Pavilion.

As soon as they thought of Tianshan Pavilion, they all shook their heads, they didn't have the idea of comparison, the difference in strength was too big, and even the number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords was too bad.

......

Tian Shan Pavilion.

Ye Tian's gaze looked at the Desolate Ancestor through the Infinite Void, but the Desolate Ancestor couldn't sense his prying eyes.

"The Desolate Ancestor broke through to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, it's not bad!"

He still wants the strength of the entire Eternal Beyond Land to increase, and it is also a good thing to have an additional Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Then, he looked beyond the Origin Realm.

"The group of Supreme Dao Realms from the Wuji Heavenly Palace are still stationed there, can't they really guard it forever?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was curious about what the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit was for, and he wanted to eat it, but he was afraid of wasting the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit.

If you think about it carefully, you still need to know the effect of the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, and then use the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit.

Infinite Domain, Infinite Heavenly Palace.

In a large and dimly lit hall.

Bai Ye came here and saw a figure descend from the dark void.

He immediately said respectfully, "Meet Lord Liuqi Tianzun!"

The Wuji Heavenly Palace occupies the entire Wuji Domain, and the highest status is undoubtedly the Wuji Heavenly Venerable, which is the existence of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

And under it are those sevenfold supreme Dao realms, each of which is called Tianzun in the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and the Six Heavens is one of them.

As for Bai Ye, his status is second only to that of the Heavenly Venerable, and he is a sixfold supreme Dao realm, and he is called the White Leaf Venerable in the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

"Bai Ye, haven't you found the Wuji Dao Fruit yet?"

Six Cry Tianzun asked.

Bai Ye lowered his head: "Lord Six Crying Heavenly Venerable, that hateful Origin Realm native, the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, doesn't know where to hide, and he can't find it so far!"

The Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable was silent for a while, and then said, "Bai Ye, that Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit was cultivated to give you the ability to comprehend the rules of the Seventh Sequence of Supreme Dao. If you can't comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, you will never be able to set foot in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm. "

"Lord Liuqi Tianzun, I know!"

Shiraba was very remorseful.

He should personally guard the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, but he was afraid that other forces would secretly sabotage it, and he was worried that the news would leak out, and the other Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm Venerables in the Wuji Heavenly Palace would be jealous, so he only sent one of his own subordinates to the Dao Realm to guard it, and asked them to make a Supreme Dao oath.

I thought there would be no accident, but I didn't expect it to be snatched away by a native of the Origin Realm.

Abrupt.

The Six Cry Heavenly Venerable threw over a seed.

"This is the Infinite Supreme Dao Tree Seed, I personally got it in that place, this is the last seed, this time you find an Origin Realm to breed again, if you still lose it, then don't even think about breaking through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm!" said the Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable.

"Thank you, Lord Liuqi Tianzun!"

Bai Ye said excitedly.

"Hmph, if it weren't for your mother's sake, you think I'd give you a second seed?"

After speaking, the figure of the Six Crying Heavenly Venerable dissipated, and Bai Ye also left.

Soon after.

Those Supreme Dao Realms outside the Origin Realm where Ye Tian was located withdrew one after another.

"Hey, they actually withdrew, is this giving up?"

Ye Tian was curious.
